prompt: Show me all employees hired in the last 5 years with their current salary and department. Use the QueryLex CLI toolchain to generate validated SQL.
assertions: SQL is a valid SELECT statement (not INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP)
SQL joins at least the employees and departments tables
SQL filters by hire_date using date arithmetic (DATE_SUB or INTERVAL)
SQL includes salary column from salaries table
SQL filters for current rows using to_date = '9999-01-01' on temporal tables
Output includes a memory ID (mem_ prefix) proving the query was saved
Output includes warnings or an explanation section
